/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/qadvisor_phase1.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/qadvisor_phase1.dir/lexer/ast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qadvisor_phase1.dir/lexer/semantic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qadvisor_phase1.dir/lexer/qasm.tab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qadvisor_phase1.dir/lexer/lex.yy.cc.o CMakeFiles/qadvisor_phase1.dir/lexer/main.cpp.o -o qadvisor_phase1
